_comment: Outscraper reviewsQuery search terms for pest-control in AU.
Only problems with video clip pools are included here.
'cockroach' is therefore redundant but harmless (OR logic, no extra cost).
- Quoted phrases DO NOT work — '"rat infestation"' returns 0 results.
Outscraper strips or ignores quotes. Do not use quoted phrases.
- Bare ambiguous stems are risky: 'rat' matches nothing here but could match
'grateful', 'brat' etc. Use multi-word terms instead (e.g. 'rat infestation').
When building the search query, terms from ALL problems are concatenated (OR logic).
The winning problem is determined client-side by keyword hit count.
